examples: This leads to continuous requirements change from iteration to iteration.
In this strategy, people accept that their team members will have idle time during each iteration.
At the end of an iteration of work, we always look back at how we did and figure out what we can do differently next time to improve.
This iteration has been hatched by Houston investment banker and Peak Oil worrywort Matt Simmons.
In the next iteration of the iPad, the glass was fused to the frame.
